detail.description: Matt Shaw homers (4) on a fly ball to left field. Alex Bregman scores. Ian Happ scores.

Reds challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Matt Shaw singles on a line drive to right fielder Spencer Steer. Matt Shaw out at 2nd on the throw, right fielder Spencer Steer to shortstop Elly De La Cruz.
